ChartAgent

기준차트 9종을 한 화면에서 보고, theme_set과 pattern treatment만 바꾸는 대시보드.

Reference Grid

기준차트 세트는 horizontal ranking, vertical bar, trend, share, contribution, comparison table, metric wall, single stat, fact table의 9종으로 고정한다. `theme_set`과 `pattern treatment`만 바꿔가며 같은 세트 전체에 스타일이 어떻게 덮이는지 바로 확인한다.

visible 9

Selected Theme

Neutral White

Clean white analytical surface with restrained accents.

theme_set neutral_white theme minimal combo neutral_system pattern signal_outline_dashboard
quiet white panelrestrained accent useclean analytical spacingref vercelref appleref notionOpen THEME.md

Selected Theme

Editorial Outline

Warm editorial charts with outline-led surface language.

theme_set editorial_outline theme editorial combo editorial_outline pattern signal_outline_editorial
warm paper surfaceoutline-led bars and slicesairy editorial rhythmref notionref clauderef financial_timesOpen THEME.md

Selected Theme

Broadcast Signal

High-contrast broadcast panels with strong urgency.

theme_set broadcast_signal theme broadcast combo broadcast_signal pattern signal_outline_broadcast
high-contrast dark panelcrisp signal outlinesurgent broadcast accent cadenceref clickhouseref vercelref broadcast_news_graphicsOpen THEME.md

Selected Theme

Dashboard Analytical

Dense but orderly dashboard system for decision support.

theme_set dashboard_analytical theme dashboard combo analytical_panel pattern signal_outline_dashboard
dense information gridbalanced KPI panelsclean operational signal languageref coinbaseref clickhouseref stripeOpen THEME.md

Selected Theme

Gallery Infographic

Decorative infographic surface with stronger visual character.

theme_set gallery_infographic theme editorial combo gallery_infographic pattern signal_outline_editorial
decorative surface identitygallery-like spacingbold pattern presenceref pinterestref clauderef editorial_infographics

Selected Theme

Poster Editorial

Type-led editorial poster surface with warm paper tone and stronger composition contrast.

theme_set poster_editorial theme editorial combo poster_editorial pattern signal_outline_poster
type-led poster hierarchywarm paper-like fieldeditorial spread contrastref pinterestref notionref claudeOpen THEME.md

Selected Theme

Market Technical

Terminal-like technical surface with disciplined density.

theme_set market_technical theme dashboard combo market_technical pattern signal_outline_dashboard
terminal densitythin technical linescompressed market signal layoutref clickhouseref coinbaseref vercelref tradingviewOpen THEME.md

어떤 채널이 지금 가장 큰가?

bar_horizontal
pattern Fillannotations 1warnings 1The dataset compares named categories with numeric values.

지역별 실적을 세로 막대로 비교하라

bar
pattern Fillannotations 1warnings 0Few categories with short labels fit a vertical bar chart.

수익 흐름은 어떻게 변했는가?

line
pattern Fillannotations 1warnings 1Ordered x values and numeric y values indicate a time-series trend.

유입 비중은 어떻게 나뉘는가?

donut
pattern Fillannotations 1warnings 0The task is framed as a share breakdown, so a donut is a compact default.

누적 구성 바로 단계별 기여도를 보여라

stacked_progress
pattern Fillannotations 1warnings 0The task asks for a stacked progress-style composition bar.

세 플랜은 무엇이 다른가?

comparison_table
pattern Fillannotations 0warnings 0Multiple columns and row-wise comparison make a table clearer than a chart.

핵심 KPI를 카드 벽으로 요약하라

metric_wall
pattern Fillannotations 3warnings 1A small set of KPIs is better shown as a metric wall than as ranked bars.

하나의 핵심 숫자를 크게 강조하라

single_stat
pattern Fillannotations 0warnings 0The dataset contains a single numeric value, so a single statistic is clearest.

핵심 사실을 빠르게 읽게 하라

fact_table
pattern Fillannotations 0warnings 0The task looks more like exact lookup than shape-based visual comparison.

빗금 패턴으로 예상 채널을 비교하라

bar_horizontal
pattern Hatchannotations 1warnings 1The dataset compares named categories with numeric values.

빗금 패턴으로 지역별 실적을 세로 막대로 비교하라

bar
pattern Hatchannotations 1warnings 0Few categories with short labels fit a vertical bar chart.

예상 구간이 포함된 추세선을 기준세트로 유지하라

line
pattern Hatchannotations 1warnings 1Ordered x values and numeric y values indicate a time-series trend.

빗금 패턴으로 비중을 구분하라

donut
pattern Hatchannotations 1warnings 0The task is framed as a share breakdown, so a donut is a compact default.

빗금 구간으로 누적 기여도를 보여라

stacked_progress
pattern Hatchannotations 1warnings 0The task asks for a stacked progress-style composition bar.

빗금 treatment 세트에서도 플랜 비교표를 유지하라

comparison_table
pattern Hatchannotations 0warnings 0Multiple columns and row-wise comparison make a table clearer than a chart.

빗금 treatment 세트에서도 KPI 카드를 유지하라

metric_wall
pattern Hatchannotations 3warnings 1A small set of KPIs is better shown as a metric wall than as ranked bars.

빗금 treatment 세트에서도 핵심 숫자를 유지하라

single_stat
pattern Hatchannotations 0warnings 0The dataset contains a single numeric value, so a single statistic is clearest.

빗금 treatment 세트에서도 팩트 테이블을 유지하라

fact_table
pattern Hatchannotations 0warnings 0The task looks more like exact lookup than shape-based visual comparison.

색맹 접근성을 위해 점무늬 패턴으로 채널을 비교하라

bar_horizontal
pattern Dotannotations 1warnings 1The dataset compares named categories with numeric values.

색맹 접근성을 위해 지역별 실적을 세로 막대로 비교하라

bar
pattern Dotannotations 1warnings 0Few categories with short labels fit a vertical bar chart.

색맹 접근성 세트에서도 추세선을 유지하라

line
pattern Dotannotations 1warnings 1Ordered x values and numeric y values indicate a time-series trend.

색맹 접근성을 위해 점무늬 패턴으로 비중을 구분하라

donut
pattern Dotannotations 1warnings 0The task is framed as a share breakdown, so a donut is a compact default.

점무늬 패턴으로 단계별 누적 기여도를 구분하라

stacked_progress
pattern Dotannotations 1warnings 0The task asks for a stacked progress-style composition bar.

접근성 세트에서도 플랜 비교표를 유지하라

fact_table

comparison_table
pattern Fillannotations 0warnings 0Multiple columns and row-wise comparison make a table clearer than a chart.

핵심 KPI를 카드 벽으로 요약하라

metric_wall
pattern Fillannotations 3warnings 1A small set of KPIs is better shown as a metric wall than as ranked bars.

하나의 핵심 숫자를 크게 강조하라

single_stat
pattern Fillannotations 0warnings 0The dataset contains a single numeric value, so a single statistic is clearest.

핵심 사실을 빠르게 읽게 하라

fact_table
pattern Fillannotations 0warnings 0The task looks more like exact lookup than shape-based visual comparison.

빗금 패턴으로 예상 채널을 비교하라

bar_horizontal
pattern Hatchannotations 1warnings 1The dataset compares named categories with numeric values.

빗금 패턴으로 지역별 실적을 세로 막대로 비교하라

bar
pattern Hatchannotations 1warnings 0Few categories with short labels fit a vertical bar chart.

예상 구간이 포함된 추세선을 기준세트로 유지하라

line
pattern Hatchannotations 1warnings 1Ordered x values and numeric y values indicate a time-series trend.

빗금 패턴으로 비중을 구분하라

donut
pattern Hatchannotations 1warnings 0The task is framed as a share breakdown, so a donut is a compact default.

빗금 구간으로 누적 기여도를 보여라

stacked_progress
pattern Hatchannotations 1warnings 0The task asks for a stacked progress-style composition bar.

빗금 treatment 세트에서도 플랜 비교표를 유지하라

빗금 treatment 세트에서도 KPI 카드를 유지하라

No matching reference charts for the current theme, family, and pattern selection.

Browse Raw Bundles

전체 audit artifact는 계속 생성한다. 다만 메인 화면을 차지하지 않도록 여기서는 대표 bundle 링크만 짧게 노출한다.

Full theme gallery dashboard_manifest.json 어떤 카테고리가 가장 큰가?짧은 레이블은 세로 막대로 비교하라입체 막대 스타일로 제품군을 비교하라예상치가 포함된 막대를 비교하라속을 채우지 않고 테두리와 빗금으로 예상치를 표시하라속을 채우지 않은 테두리 막대로 잠정치를 보여라

Chart Detail

Reference Chart Detail

카드를 클릭하면 여기에 큰 미리보기와 선택된 카드의 이유, 경고, artifact 링크가 표시된다.
